multiplechoiceresponse.label: The same image produces different Grad-CAM heatmaps when visualized for islet, coast, and beach_house. What does this demonstrate about the model?

choicegroup.choice: The model uses a single generic feature representation regardless of class.
The model associates different spatial regions with different semantic scene labels.
The Grad-CAM algorithm is unstable across multiple runs.
The image contains multiple objects, confusing the network.

div.p: Grad-CAM highlights image regions that most support a specific class score. The fact that different regions are emphasized for different labels shows that the network has learned distinct visual concepts (e.g., open water, shoreline curvature, buildings near beaches) and reuses them differently depending on the class being evaluated.
